reviews.comment: Very friendly, very professional business. Every time myself or my girlfriend (she had her car tinted as well) text Sharyn, she responded swiftly and came across with tons of knowledge about the service she sells. I've had 3 different shops tint the windows on my cars and I had to go back with all 3 to have bubbles removed. It's been a week and a half and I can't find any imperfections.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you Brad! We're so happy you're satisfied with our services and hopefully have earned your loyalty for any future tint jobs! -Sharyn

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdHU2UmlRRRAB

reviews.comment: I was refered here by some of my friends from the area. While my mothers car was being tinted i proceed to ask about the possibility of custom stickers. They then told me thats not a problem, they gave me a site to where i could look at thousands and thousands of different fonts. I looked through a bunch and seen that they didnt have quite what i wanted. Then i found out they have the Audi font which is what i wanted. Joe brought me back and made sure it was exactly right in height and width according to my windshield size that he brought up on his tinting program. I would like to finish up by saying yes there is more local tinting and custom sticker places closer to me in Gettysburg, but i will be coming back down to these guys for all my tint and sticker work. They are good at what they do. Thanks guys.

reviewReply.comment: Hi Matt! It means so much to us that you came to us from out of state! We're so glad you're satisfied with your tint and windshield decal. We look forward to doing more customer work for you in the future!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3LXVtZzd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
When I texted Frederick Window Tinting on a Saturday night at 9:30pm and Joe got me in the next day less than 12 hours later I was shocked!
He made my appointment at 2:30pm and when I got to the shop Joe was ready to go!
He tinted my windows (2 door Sahara Jeep Wrangler) in less than 30 minutes, and when I mentioned that I brought decals that I had purchased online to see if he could apply them, Joe didn't even hesitate, he said he would apply them same day without having to making a new appointment date.
Because the decals I had for nearly 6 months were twisted he also didn't hesitate to create custom decals and apply them without charging me an arm and a leg for custom work.
I have been to these types of shops before and have ended up feeling nervous to even enter as well as uncomfortable while waiting for my car to be completed...NOT here! These folks were amazing! Very welcoming and down to earth kinda folks!
Sharyn and Joe were wonderful, friendly and very laid back. They didn't rush me out the door, and explained thoroughly on how to care for my windows and decals.
The price was unbeatable, and the service was bar-none, top-notch!
I will definitely be back and will certainly tell folks about my experience at Frederick Windows Tinting.
I rarely write reviews for businesses but I felt compelled to write one for this company because my experience was just that good!

reviewReply.comment: Hi Tyler! Our company is a success because of wonderful customers such as yourself. We love your Jeep and what you've done to it, and we look forward to doing the wheels and paint protection for you! Thank you for becoming part of the FWT family, and you're always welcome to text us at 9:30pm on a Saturday ;)
